---
title: "Lecture 8 Quiz: Introduction to CSS"
jupyter: julia-1.12
---

::: {.callout-note}
Review before quiz:
[Lectures](/lectures/lecture-08.qmd) | [Week 2 Content](/content/week-02.qmd) | [Lab 2](/labs/lab-02.qmd) | [Assignment 1](/assignment/01-assignment.qmd)
:::

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
using QuizQuestions
```

## Lecture 8 Self-Check

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. HyperText Markup Language", "B. Cascading Style Sheets", "C. Computer Style Syntax", "D. Creative Style System"]
question = "Question 1: What does CSS stand for?"
answer = 2
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. Inline CSS", "B. Internal CSS", "C. External CSS", "D. Browser default styles"]
question = "Question 2: Which approach is generally recommended for maintainable styling across multiple pages?"
answer = 3
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. `#`", "B. `.`", "C. `*`", "D. `@`"]
question = "Question 3: Which symbol is used to target a CSS class selector?"
answer = 2
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. `font-style`", "B. `background-color`", "C. `href`", "D. `src`"]
question = "Question 4: Which of the following is a valid CSS property for element background?"
answer = 2
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. `selector = property: value`", "B. `selector { property: value; }`", "C. `<selector>property:value</selector>`", "D. `selector(property=value)`"]
question = "Question 5: Which option shows correct basic CSS rule syntax?"
answer = 2
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```
